reasoning_content:
Interesting - the default title_size seems to be 20, not 10. The Chromosome class might have a default title_size of 20. Let me check what the actual default is in Bio.Graphics.BasicChromosome.Chromosome.

Actually, looking at the error, when title_size is not set on the instance, `getattr(self, 'title_size', 10)` returns... wait, the output says font size is 20. So maybe the class has a class attribute `title_size = 20`? Or the original Chromosome class sets a default of 20?

Let me check the BasicChromosome module.
